pageContent.homeHeroTitle: Doctor-led medical cannabis, dispensed with the patience of an apothecary.
pageContent.homeHeroDescription: For patients with chronic conditions, prescribed under Portuguese medical authority. Real consultations. Pharmaceutical-grade chain. No recreational framing.

home.heroTitle: Doctor-led medical cannabis, dispensed with the patience of an apothecary.
home.heroDescription: For patients with chronic conditions, prescribed under Portuguese medical authority.

about.heading: A clinic, not a dispensary.
about.mission: Apothicare exists to make medical cannabis a credible therapeutic option in Portugal — prescribed by qualified physicians, dispensed under INFARMED authority, and followed up the way any other long-term medication should be.
about.story: Founded in Lisbon in 2022 by Dr Elena Marques, a consultant in pain medicine, after a decade of patients asking the same question: where do I get this safely, in Portugal, from a doctor? We answered with a practice — proper consultations, INFARMED-authorised imports, pharmaceutical-grade product, and follow-up care.
about.values: Evidence first. Patients first. Patience as a clinical virtue.

contact.heading: Reach the practice
contact.hours: Monday to Friday, 09:00–18:00 WET. Saturday by appointment.

pageContent.aboutMission: Apothicare exists to make medical cannabis a credible therapeutic option in Portugal — prescribed by qualified physicians, dispensed under INFARMED authority, and followed up the way any other long-term medication should be.

educationHotspots.title: Why these badges matter
educationHotspots.description: INFARMED authorisation and EU-GMP certification together mean the medicine you receive is the same pharmaceutical grade you'd expect from any hospital pharmacy in the EU.

educationHotspots.title: Why eligibility is free
educationHotspots.description: We will not take payment from a patient we cannot legally or ethically treat. The five-minute eligibility form catches that before money changes hands.

footer.tagline: Doctor-led medical cannabis · INFARMED licensed · EU-GMP
footer.disclaimer: Apothicare is a private medical practice authorised by INFARMED to prescribe and dispense medical cannabis to eligible patients. For prescription use only. Patients only. Not for sale to under-18s. The information on this site is intended to support — not replace — the relationship between a patient and their physician.
